# commit-dex-notifications

Commit-server, dex-server, and notifications-controller cmd-params

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/cmd-params/commit-dex-notifications` |

## Input

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
data:
  commitserver.listen.address: "0.0.0.0"
  commitserver.metrics.listen.address: "127.0.0.1"
  commitserver.log.format: json
  commitserver.log.level: info
  commitserver.grpc.enable.txt.service.config: "true"
  dexserver.log.format: json
  dexserver.log.level: debug
  dexserver.disable.tls: "false"
  dexserver.connector.failure.continue: "true"
  notificationscontroller.log.level: info
  notificationscontroller.log.format: json
  notificationscontroller.processors.count: "2"
  notificationscontroller.selfservice.enabled: "true"
  notificationscontroller.repo.server.plaintext: "false"
  notificationscontroller.repo.server.ca.cert.path: /app/config/reposerver/tls/ca.crt
  notificationscontroller.repo.server.client.cert.path: /app/config/reposerver/tls/tls.crt
  notificationscontroller.repo.server.client.cert.key.path: /app/config/reposerver/tls/tls.key
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  commitServer:
    grpcTXTServiceConfigEnabled: true
    listen:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      metricsAddress: 127.0.0.1
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
  controller: {}
  dexServer:
    connectorFailureContinue: true
    log:
      format: json
      level: debug
    tlsEnabled: true
  notifications:
    log:
      format: json
      level: info
    processorsCount: 2
    repoServerClient:
      caCertPath: /app/config/reposerver/tls/ca.crt
      clientCertKeyPath: /app/config/reposerver/tls/tls.key
      clientCertPath: /app/config/reposerver/tls/tls.crt
    selfServiceEnabled: true
    tlsEnabled: true
  repoServer: {}
  server: {}
```
